description: Lock risc_microprocessors to Berkeley RISC-I style VLSI RISC microprocessor implementation, not IBM 801 architecture alone or generic compiler theory.

checks.reason: The node is scoped to Berkeley RISC-I chips received in 1981, not the earlier IBM 801 architectural project.
The scoped first RISC microprocessor was a VLSI processor chip.
Earlier CPU-on-chip microprocessors are lineage rather than the distinctive RISC method.
Broad algorithms/computation theory is too generic for the direct RISC microprocessor implementation scope.
Integrated-circuit ancestry flows through the more specific VLSI design prerequisite.
